captureStep.text:
"Test class org.magicwerk.brownies.core.strings.StringSplitterTest$StringSplitterTestSet1a
Result: [a, c]
Test class org.magicwerk.brownies.core.strings.StringSplitterTest$StringSplitterTestSet1b
Result: [a, , d]
Test class org.magicwerk.brownies.core.strings.StringSplitterTest$StringSplitterTestSet2a
Result: [a, d]
"

"String: a
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "a" }
		splitFirst= [a, null]
		splitLast= [null, a]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "a" }
		splitFirst= [a, null]
		splitLast= [null, a]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "a" }
		splitFirst= [a, null]
		splitLast= [null, a]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "a" }
		splitFirst= [a, null]
		splitLast= [null, a]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [a, null]
		splitLast= [null, a]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [a, null]
		splitLast= [null, a]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "a"

String: a-b
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "a", "b" }
		splitFirst= [a, b]
		splitLast= [a, b]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "a", "-", "b" }
		splitFirst= [a, -b]
		splitLast= [a-, b]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "a-", "b" }
		splitFirst= [a-, b]
		splitLast= [a-, b]
		getFirst= "a-"
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "a", "-b" }
		splitFirst= [a, -b]
		splitLast= [a, -b]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-b"
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-b" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a, -b]
		splitLast= [a, -b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-b" ("b")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "a-" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a-, b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [a-, b]
		getFirst= "a-" ("a")
		getLast= "b"

String: a--b
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "a", "", "b" } ({ "a", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a, -b] ([a, b])
		splitLast= [a-, b] ([a, b])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "a", "-", "", "-", "b" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a, --b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [a--, b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "a-", "-", "b" } ({ "a-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a-, -b] ([a-, b])
		splitLast= [a--, b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "a-"
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "a", "-", "-b" } ({ "a", "-b" })
		splitFirst= [a, --b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [a-, -b] ([a, -b])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-b"
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-", "-b" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a, --b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [a-, -b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-b" ("b")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "a-", "-" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [a-, -b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [a--, b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "a-" ("a")
		getLast= "b"

String: a-b-c
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "a", "b", "c" }
		splitFirst= [a, b-c]
		splitLast= [a-b, c]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "c"
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "a", "-", "b", "-", "c" }
		splitFirst= [a, -b-c]
		splitLast= [a-b-, c]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "c"
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "a-", "b-", "c" }
		splitFirst= [a-, b-c]
		splitLast= [a-b-, c]
		getFirst= "a-"
		getLast= "c"
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "a", "-b", "-c" }
		splitFirst= [a, -b-c]
		splitLast= [a-b, -c]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-c"
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-b", "-c" } ({ "a", "-", "b", "-", "c" })
		splitFirst= [a, -b-c]
		splitLast= [a-b, -c] ([a-b-, c])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-c" ("c")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "a-", "b-" } ({ "a", "-", "b", "-", "c" })
		splitFirst= [a-, b-c] ([a, -b-c])
		splitLast= [a-b-, c]
		getFirst= "a-" ("a")
		getLast= "c"

String: a-
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "a", "" }
		splitFirst= [a, ]
		splitLast= [a, ]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "a", "-", "" }
		splitFirst= [a, -]
		splitLast= [a-, ]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "a-", "" }
		splitFirst= [a-, ]
		splitLast= [a-, ]
		getFirst= "a-"
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "a", "-" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [a, -] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [a, -] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-" ("a")
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-" } ({ "a", "-", "" })
		splitFirst= [a, -]
		splitLast= [a, -] ([a-, ])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-" ("")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "a-" } ({ "a", "-", "" })
		splitFirst= [a-, ] ([a, -])
		splitLast= [a-, ]
		getFirst= "a-" ("a")
		getLast= ""

String: -a
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "", "a" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [, a] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [, a] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "", "-", "a" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [, -a] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [-, a] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "-", "a" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [-, a] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [-, a] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "-" ("a")
		getLast= "a"
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "", "-a" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [, -a] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [, -a] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "-a" ("a")
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-a" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [, -a] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [, -a] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "-a" ("a")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "-" } ({ "a" })
		splitFirst= [-, a] ([a, null])
		splitLast= [-, a] ([null, a])
		getFirst= "-" ("a")
		getLast= "a"

String: -a-b
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "", "a", "b" } ({ "a", "b" })
		splitFirst= [, a-b] ([a, b])
		splitLast= [-a, b] ([a, b])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "", "-", "a", "-", "b" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [, -a-b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [-a-, b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "-", "a-", "b" } ({ "a-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [-, a-b] ([a-, b])
		splitLast= [-a-, b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "-" ("a-")
		getLast= "b"
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "", "-a", "-b" } ({ "a", "-b" })
		splitFirst= [, -a-b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [-a, -b] ([a, -b])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "-b"
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-a", "-b" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [, -a-b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [-a, -b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "" ("a")
		getLast= "-b" ("b")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "-", "a-" } ({ "a", "-", "b" })
		splitFirst= [-, a-b] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [-a-, b] ([a-, b])
		getFirst= "-" ("a")
		getLast= "b"

String: a-b-
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "a", "b", "" }
		splitFirst= [a, b-]
		splitLast= [a-b, ]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "a", "-", "b", "-", "" }
		splitFirst= [a, -b-]
		splitLast= [a-b-, ]
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "a-", "b-", "" }
		splitFirst= [a-, b-]
		splitLast= [a-b-, ]
		getFirst= "a-"
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "a", "-b", "-" } ({ "a", "-b" })
		splitFirst= [a, -b-] ([a, -b])
		splitLast= [a-b, -] ([a, -b])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-" ("-b")
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-b", "-" } ({ "a", "-", "b", "-", "" })
		splitFirst= [a, -b-]
		splitLast= [a-b, -] ([a-b-, ])
		getFirst= "a"
		getLast= "-" ("")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "a-", "b-" } ({ "a", "-", "b", "-", "" })
		splitFirst= [a-, b-] ([a, -b-])
		splitLast= [a-b-, ]
		getFirst= "a-" ("a")
		getLast= ""

String: -
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "", "" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, ] ([, null])
		splitLast= [, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "", "-", "" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, -] ([, null])
		splitLast= [-, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "-", "" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [-, ] ([, null])
		splitLast= [-, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= "-" ("")
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "", "-" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, -] ([, null])
		splitLast= [, -] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= "-" ("")
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, -] ([, null])
		splitLast= [, -] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= "-" ("")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "-" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [-, ] ([, null])
		splitLast= [-, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= "-" ("")
		getLast= ""

String: --
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "", "", "" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, -] ([, null])
		splitLast= [-, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "", "-", "", "-", "" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, --] ([, null])
		splitLast= [--, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "-", "-", "" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [-, -] ([, null])
		splitLast= [--, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= "-" ("")
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "", "-", "-" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, --] ([, null])
		splitLast= [-, -] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= "-" ("")
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { "-", "-" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, --] ([, null])
		splitLast= [-, -] ([null, ])
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= "-" ("")
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { "-", "-" } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [-, -] ([, null])
		splitLast= [--, ] ([null, ])
		getFirst= "-" ("")
		getLast= ""

String: 
	separatorMode: REMOVE
		split= { "" }
		splitFirst= [, null]
		splitLast= [null, ]
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: OWN
		split= { "" }
		splitFirst= [, null]
		splitLast= [null, ]
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_LEFT
		split= { "" }
		splitFirst= [, null]
		splitLast= [null, ]
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ADD_RIGHT
		split= { "" }
		splitFirst= [, null]
		splitLast= [null, ]
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: STARTS
		split= { } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, null]
		splitLast= [null, ]
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""
	separatorMode: ENDS
		split= { } ({ "" })
		splitFirst= [, null]
		splitLast= [null, ]
		getFirst= ""
		getLast= ""

"

"a
- split: [a]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [a, null] / [null, a]
- first/afterFirst: a / null
- beforeLast/last: null / a
a-b
- split: [a, b]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [a, b] / [a, b]
- first/afterFirst: a / b
- beforeLast/last: a / b
a--b
- split: [a, , b]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [a, -b] / [a-, b]
- first/afterFirst: a / -b
- beforeLast/last: a- / b
a-b-c
- split: [a, b, c]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [a, b-c] / [a-b, c]
- first/afterFirst: a / b-c
- beforeLast/last: a-b / c
a-
- split: [a, ]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [a, ] / [a, ]
- first/afterFirst: a / 
- beforeLast/last: a / 
-a
- split: [, a]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [, a] / [, a]
- first/afterFirst: / a
- beforeLast/last: / a
-a-b
- split: [, a, b]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [, a-b] / [-a, b]
- first/afterFirst: / a-b
- beforeLast/last: -a / b
a-b-
- split: [a, b, ]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [a, b-] / [a-b, ]
- first/afterFirst: a / b-
- beforeLast/last: a-b / 
-
- split: [, ]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [, ] / [, ]
- first/afterFirst: / 
- beforeLast/last: / 
--
- split: [, , ]
- splitFirst/splitLast: [, -] / [-, ]
- first/afterFirst: / -
- beforeLast/last: - / 

- split: []
- splitFirst/splitLast: [, null] / [null, ]
- first/afterFirst: / null
- beforeLast/last: null / 
null
- split: null
- splitFirst/splitLast: null / null
- first/afterFirst: null / null
- beforeLast/last: null / null
"
